textPlain:
We’re excited to introduce FlowSynx, a powerful new workflow orchestration engine designed to seamless Workflow Automation—Declarative, Extensible, and Fully Controllable. Turn complex processes into maintainable, auditable, and transparent workflows that adapt to your business needs.Why FlowSynx?
Most orchestration tools lock you into rigid ecosystems. FlowSynx takes a plugin-first approach, letting you compose Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) workflows that adapt to your exact needs.
